title: Curriculum-aligned problem record
description: Schema for elementary math problems targeting Stage III (grades 5-6) of the national curriculum. Every problem entering main must conform to this schema.

topic_codes.description: At least one learning-performance code (n-III/s-III/r-III/d-III) and/or content code (N-5-*/N-6-*/S-6-*/D-5-*)

expected_steps_min.description: Minimum number of solution steps required for this problem

steps.description: Ordered solution steps; each step must be a single verifiable operation

value.description: Numeric answer (number or string for fractions)

unit.description: Answer unit, e.g. 公里, 元, 公升

license_type.description: License type, e.g. CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, public-domain, needs_review

evidence_snapshot.description: File path or hash of source content snapshot for reproducibility

confidence.description: Model confidence; < 0.7 triggers human review queue

grading_exempt.description: If true, skip certain topic-specific restrictions (e.g. N-6-3 remainder problems marked as non-assessed)

similarity_score.description: Similarity to existing problems in the bank; > 0.85 triggers dedup review

model.description: Model used for generation (e.g. gpt-4o, gemini-2.0-flash)

self_refine_iterations.description: Number of Self-Refine iterations before passing

prompt_version.description: Version hash of the prompt template used

generation_metadata.description: Metadata about the generation process for auditability

must_include_formula.description: Formulas that must appear in solution steps

unit_consistency.description: Whether unit consistency check is required

forbidden_words.description: Words that must NOT appear (e.g. curriculum restrictions)

common_error_reminder.description: A reminder about common misconceptions (e.g. S-6-2 scale misconception)

data_points_min.description: Minimum data points for chart/graph problems (e.g. D-5-1 line charts)

status.description: Human review status for low-confidence or edge-case problems

human_review.description: Human review tracking for problems that failed auto-qualification
